description: Style NoteCreated for today's generation, this spinn Crome shoe embodies the brand's motto - combining technology and high-octane fashion. We think these are just right, both for sport and for braving the urban jungle, thanks to their nonchalantly sturdy aesthetic. An all-weather staple, the style perfectly suits the cosmopolitan vibe you love!Product DetailsRound toed casual shoe in brown with a flat heel and lace-up fasteningSynthetic leather upper with overlaysWell padded collar and tongue (with branding)EVA midsole with foxing at the toe regionTPR outsole with terraced lugs at the forefoot and suction points along the centre of the entire outsoleMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
